project_type: FunPay Cardinal (FPC) plugin - single Python file plugin for SMM service reselling via smmway.ru API
build_system: None (single-file FPC plugin, loaded by Cardinal at runtime)
verification_instructions: 1. Run py_compile to confirm no syntax errors. 2. Run ast.parse to confirm valid AST. 3. Grep the file to verify the reordering code now handles both dict and Handler-object formats.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single Python file plugin
environment_constraints: No FPC runtime available - can only validate via AST/syntax checking. No pyTelegramBotAPI installed for import-level tests.
contribution_requirements: Single file plugin, all code in one .py file
key_patterns: pyTelegramBotAPI 4.x stores handlers as Handler objects (namedtuple-like) with attributes: .callback (the function), .filters (dict with 'func' key for filter lambdas). Older versions stored handlers as plain dicts: {'function': fn, 'filters': {'func': filter_fn}}. The reordering code must handle BOTH formats to be compatible across versions.
directory_structure: Single file repository: smmway_v1.3.11 (2).py is the entire plugin, README.md is empty
